prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 53515→49992→49231→50491，近三年整体在 49000–50500 区间窄幅波动，2025 年基准约 50491 名，较 2024 年小幅后移约 1260 名；该校在四川理科/物理类计划 2022–2025 年均为 40 人；2026 年计划 37 人，较 2025 年缩招 3 人（-7.5%），缩招通常使竞争略有缓解，位次数字趋于减小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 延边大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 198 位持续上升至 2026 年第 157 位，近年排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所上升；该校近年无明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第 79 位（一般），短视频平台关注度不高，未出现爆款传播，报考热度整体平稳；延边大学在第五轮学科评估中无 A- 及以上等级学科，优势学科不突出，对高分考生的额外吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校物理类招生专业涵盖计算机、电子信息、临床医学等当前社会偏热专业，对考生 有一定吸引力；四川省 2026 年高考总报名人数约 53.5 万，较 2025 年（约 46.3 万）增加约 7.2 万人（+15.5%），按近年物理类占比约 61.5% 估算，2026 年物理类考生约 32.9 万，较 2025 年（28.5 万）增加约 4.4 万人，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 50491、2026 年缩招 7.5%（缓解竞争）、软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）、四川省物理类考生大幅增加约 15.5%（加剧竞争）等多重因素，缩招的缓解效应与考生增加的加剧效应相互对冲，考生规模增幅更大且排名上升增强学校吸引力，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较；预测最低位次约 48419 名，区间 47919–48919 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 53515→49992→49231→50491. Over the past three years, it fluctuated narrowly within the 49000–50500 range. The 2025 baseline is about 50491, a slight decrease of about 1260 places compared to 2024. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Sichuan was 40 students each year from 2022 to 2025. In 2026, the plan is 37 students, a reduction of 3 students (-7.5%) compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment usually eases competition slightly, leading to a smaller ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has steadily risen from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. The university has had no significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th (average), with low attention on short video platforms and no viral content, indicating overall stable application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University has no disciplines rated A- or above, so its advantageous disciplines are not prominent, limiting additional appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's Physics Category enrollment majors include computer science, electronic information, clinical medicine, and other currently popular majors, which have some appeal to candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan Gaokao is about 535,000, an increase of about 72,000 (+15.5%) compared to 2025 (about 463,000). Based on the recent proportion of Physics Category candidates at about 61.5%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 329,000, an increase of about 44,000 compared to 2025 (285,000), significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 50491, the 7.5% enrollment reduction in 2026 (easing competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing appeal), and the significant increase of about 15.5% in Sichuan Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition), the easing effect of enrollment reduction and the intensifying effect of candidate increase offset each other. However, the larger increase in candidate numbers and the rising ranking enhance the university's appeal. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be approximately 48419, with a range of 47919–48919.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<47919), you can focus on stretching for popular engineering majors in Tier 1 such as Electronic Information Engineering and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>48919), you should use Tier 3 majors as safety to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 8430→8649→8512→7312. In 2025, there was a significant forward shift (ranking number decreased by about 1200), with a baseline of approximately 7312, the best admission ranking in the past four years. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Sichuan was 13 students from 2022 to 2025. In 2026, the plan is 16 students, an increase of 3 students (+23.1%) compared to 2025. Expansion usually intensifies competition, leading to an increase in ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has continuously risen from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, reflecting the university's enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In recent years, there have been no significant negative public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th (average), indicating low attention on short video platforms and overall stable application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with no outstanding advantageous disciplines, limiting additional appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The history category majors mainly include Chinese Language and Literature, Korean, Sociology, etc., with overall stable social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan Gaokao is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 72,000 (+15.5%) compared to 2025 (approximately 463,000). Based on the recent history category proportion of about 38.5%, the estimated number of history category candidates in 2026 is about 206,000, an increase of about 28,000 from 2025 (178,000), significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 7312 (best in four years), the 2026 enrollment expansion of 23.1% (intensifying competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), and the significant increase in Sichuan history category candidates by about 15.7% (intensifying competition), both expansion and candidate increase point to an increase in ranking numbers (harder to enter). Moreover, the large forward shift in 2025 ranking may have a correction potential. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be approximately 8425, with a range of 7925–8925.
